title: HEALING CIRCLE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HEALING CIRCLE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides domestic and sexual violence services, including safety planning, crisis intervention, advocacy, and educational services. Works with local programs to facilitate safety planning, provide transportation as necessary, and ensure the delivery of culturally relevant services in local shelters. Weekly domestic violence support groups that are closed groups held off-site for confidentiality reasons. Free child care is available. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic and sexual violence, primarily serves those who self-identify as Native American Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm. Support group times vary. Email (503) 288-8177 339 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (503) 288-8177 ext 339 Confidential voicemail Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clark, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues Certificates/Forms Assistance * Sexual Assault Issues Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Support Groups Domestic/Family Violence Legal Services Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - MICRO ENTERPRISE EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MANY NATIONS ACADEMY EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLEGE AND CAREER SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH EQUITY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS YOUTH SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - NAYA GENERATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTER CARE SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE INDIAN PARENTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS AND SEASONAL PROGRAMMING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CULTURAL ARTS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
